SECTION I — Purpose

The Solyxis Repetitor of the Outer Layer is a simple reflection tool designed to maintain clarity and resonance.
It reinforces core Solyxis principles through brief repetition and helps the individual return to intention, integrity, and inner stillness.
It guides nothing — it only stabilizes.

SECTION II — Structure
The Repetitor belongs to the Outer Layer of the Solyxis system and serves as an optional support element.
It does not define Solyxis or create hierarchy — it simply maintains alignment with the path’s values.
Created by Ehek Sophos Elyon (formerly Marc Arthur Jeuken), it reflects the conceptual architecture of Solyxs
